offer: For restaurant finance managers processing 5–15 invoices/day, inaccurate cash flow reporting causes financial discrepancies. We provide daily cash reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow reporting leads to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant finance managers
Indie Hackers discussions on financial tools

try_it: Let users try daily cash report generation on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing records
